name: Fathom
one_liner: Fathom is an AI meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and summarizes meetings to provide actionable insights and automate workflows.

evidence.claim: Fathom provides a public API accessible to all users for building workflows and integrations.
Fathom provides an official MCP server for custom workflows.
Search citation: Fathom Expands with New Features Designed to Extract Maximum Value From Every Conversation
Search citation: Fathom Product Updates and New Features

api_notes: The API provides access to meeting insights, transcripts, summaries, action items, and metadata. Rate limits are set at 60 calls per minute.
auth_notes: API keys are created at the user level, and OAuth 2.0 is used for third-party integration apps.
access_notes: The public API is available to all users; developers can browse documentation and start building without gated access or partner status. OAuth apps can be registered for marketplace listings.
mcp_notes: The official documentation lists an MCP server as an integration option.
